discover.tryDifferent: Try different search terms or filters

instances.title: My Instances
instances.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this instance?
instances.name: Instance Name

library.title: Library
library.installContent: Browse the Discover tab to find content

friends.title: Friends
friends.emptyDescription: Add friends by their Minecraft username to start chatting and playing together.
friends.emptyHint: Click the + button to add a friend
friends.errorLoading: Failed to load friends. Please try again.
friends.wantsToBeFriends: wants to be friends with you!

chat.deleteForMeDescription: Remove this message from your view
chat.deleteForEveryoneDescription: Remove this message for all participants

settings.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the launcher interface.
settings.platformDescription: Set the default platform for mod browsing.
settings.audioDescription: Configure audio output and call settings.
settings.messageSoundDescription: Play a sound when receiving a new message.
settings.sendSoundDescription: Play a sound when sending a message.
settings.outputDeviceDescription: Select the audio output device for calls and notifications.
settings.callVolumeDescription: Volume of the other person during calls.
settings.microphoneDeviceDescription: Select the microphone to use for voice messages and calls.
settings.voiceActivityDescription: Automatically activate when you start speaking during calls.
settings.restartDescription: The launcher needs to restart to apply the language change.
settings.jvmDescription: Configure Java settings and memory allocation.
settings.javaPathDescription: Path to the Java executable. Auto-detected if empty.
settings.customJvmArgsDescription: Advanced: Add custom JVM flags. Use with caution.
settings.warningHighAlloc: Allocating more than 75% of system RAM may cause performance issues.
settings.apiKeysDescription: Configure API keys for mod platforms.
settings.curseforgeApiKeyDescription: Required for CurseForge mod downloads. Get it from curseforge.com.
